n.b.k.r.institute of science and technology vidyanagar autonomous international womens day celebrations women empowerment cell n o t i c e 02032026 in celebration of international womens day, women empowerment cell wec is organizing various competitions exclusively for girl students. we cordially invite all interested girl students to participate in these competitions and showcase their talents. for further information students may contact dr.s.indhumathi, co-ordinator of wec cell no8985121344  dr,b.vasavi, co-coordinator of wec cell no9493238155. the competitions scheduled for international womens day include 1. pencil art date  time 532026 930a.m. rules and regulations 1. participants have to use a4 size paper venue boys waiting shed near workshop sheets for drawing. 2. participants need to bring a4 sheets judges and other material required. 1. smt. m. sujana 3. time limit is 90 minutes. 2. smt. p. chandrakala 2. rangoli date  time 532026 1000a.m. rules and regulations 1. theme  women empowerment venue boys waiting shed near workshop 2. participants need to bring rangoli material and other accessories judges 3. maximum of 2 members is allowed in a 1. dr.g.kameswari team. 2. dr.k.radika 4. time limit is 90 minutes 3. solo singing date  time 632026130 p.m rules and regulations 1. time allotted for each performance is venue me seminar hall 2-3 minutes. 2. participants will not be allowed to judges refer to the lyrics while singing. 1. dr. p. vijaya jyothi 3. choice of song is open to the 2. smt. j. charishma participants but the song should not have any slangs or derogatory language. 4. solo dancing date  time 632024130p.m rules and regulations venue me seminar hall 1. time limit is 2-3 minutes. judges 2. it could be just one song or a medley 1. dr. p. dhana selvi of songs on any theme. 2. smt. j. charishma

5. e poster presentation date time 632026  3p.m rules and regulations 1. create your poster using ms-power venue me seminar hall point, using a single slide. size  1366 x 768 .jpeg judges 2. focus on themes like womens 1. dr. n.usha empowerment womens safety 2. dr.r.lavanya or gender equality. 3. time limit is 35 minutes for presentation followed by 25 minutes for qa. 4. maximum 2 participants are allowed per poster. 6. mehendi design competition date  time  06032026 2 p.m. rules and regulations 1. mehendi design must cover one hand venue ht lab  near me seminar hall and also must be covering both sides of the palm palmer as well as the judges dorsal side of the hand. 1. dr. y. chitra rekha 2. participants need to bring mehendi 2. dr. m. harita cones 3. participants can apply mehendi on their own hand or any other persons hand. 4. time limit is one hour. note 1. registration fee for each event per participant is  50. 2. participants need to report at the venue 30 minutes before the scheduled time for registration.

dr. gopi chand merugu e-mail gopichond.ugcgov.in deputy secretary no.f.2-102023ac-policy july 2024 12 jul 2024 the registrar, jawaharlal nehru technological university, anantapur, andhra pradesh. sub- extension of autonomous status to n.b.k.r. institute of science  technology, vidyanagar, kota-mandal, tirupati-dist. a.p. affiliated to jawaharlal nehru technological university, anantapur sirmadam, this has reference to the proposal submitted by n.b.k.r. institute of science  technology, vidyanagar, kota-mandal, tirupati-dist. a.p. affiliated to jawaharlal nehru technological university, anantapur for extension of autonomous status. the commission in its meeting held on 25.06.2024 has approved the recommendation of the standing committee on autonomous colleges to extend the autonomous status to n.b.k.r. institute of science  technology, vidyanagar, kota-mandal, tirupati-dist. a.p. affiliated to jawaharlal nehru technological university, ananatpur for a period of 10 years from the academic year 2024-2025 to 2033-2034 as per clause 8.2 of the ugc conferment of autonomous status upon colleges and measures for maintenance of standards in autonomous colleges regulations, 2023. the university, is therefore, requested to issue necessary notification within 30 days regarding the extension of autonomous status to the college as per ugc conferment of autonomous status upon colleges and measures for maintenance of standards in autonomous colleges regulations, 2023. the autonomous college is required to abide by all the provisions of the ugc regulations for autonomous colleges. the regulations are available on the ugc website, www.ugc.gov.in. non-compliance of the requirements and conditions prescribed in the said regulations shall attract action as per clause -13 of the ugc conferment of autonomous status upon colleges and measures for maintenance of standards in autonomous colleges regulations, 2023. the college should apply to university grants commission for extension of autonomous status at least three months before the completion of autonomy period. yours faithfully,  . 1- or l..1 .0 dr. gopi ch nd rugu deputy secretary cont..

2 copy to- 1. the principal secretary, andhra pradesh state council of higher education sree mahendra enclave, nri block c-block i  ii floors, opposite state bank of india adjacent to nh-16, tadepalli, guntur-522 501 2. the principal, n.b.k.r. institute of science  technology, vidyanagar, kota-mandal, tirupati-dist. a.p. i the college is advised to go for the required naacnba accreditation at least six months before the expiry of current validity and obtain the grading naacnba as per the ugc conferment of autonomous status upon colleges and measures for maintenance of standards in autonomous colleges regulations, 2023 and intimate the same to ugc to revisit the above decision, if required. ii the collegelnstitute is advised to submit a report regarding examination cell and constitution of statutory bodies as required under clauses 11 and 12 of the ugc conferment of autonomous status upon colleges and measures for maintenance of standards in autonomous colleges regulations, 2023 to ensure proper management of academic, financial and general administrative affairs. non compliance ofthe above shall attract action as per clause -13 ofthe ugc regulations - 2023. iii the collegelnstitute is advised to take necessary steps for implementation of nep 2020 and intimate the ugc. , lotl jplk dr.gopi ch nd m rugu deputysecretary
